summary.intent: Fix clippy lint errors across multiple crates before pushing and creating a PR.
summary.outcome: All clippy issues resolved across three crates (matrix, node-host, skills), changes committed, and ready to push.

repo: The moltis repo uses a pre-commit or pre-push hook that enforces clippy and formatting checks.
moltis-node-host had 22 large Err-variant clippy warnings (pre-existing).
Removing HELP_TEXT from the matrix handler broke existing test imports — tests.rs imports symbols from the handler module.

code.finding: Imports HELP_TEXT from the handler; removing it without updating the test file causes a compilation breakage.
Had 22 large Err-variant clippy warnings that were pre-existing and needed fixing.
Had 2 needless-return clippy warnings that were pre-existing.

workflow: Fixing clippy issues in independent crates can be parallelized using concurrent agents.
Always verify clippy and formatting are clean before committing to avoid hook failures.

friction: A prior change removed HELP_TEXT from the matrix handler but did not update the corresponding test file, causing a breakage that had to be fixed before proceeding.
Pre-existing clippy issues in moltis-node-host and moltis-skills were unrelated to the primary task but blocked the push.
